brand_confusion_issue.description: AI confuses growth4u.io with growth4u.org (US financing company), growth4u.cl (Chilean digital agency), and growth4u.fr (French neuroscience company). This risks sending potential clients to wrong websites.

opportunity_gaps.description: 0% visibility in CNMV/regulatory queries despite claiming CNMV expertise. 8 authoritative domains cited (CNMV, FinReg360, ajtapia.com) — these are the exact authorities that should cite Growth4U as the 'marketing that understands CNMV'

ECP4 ('quemado por agencias') is the HIGHEST PAIN (92/100) but Growth4U has 0% visibility. 'Agency scam' queries cite NO agencies at all — pure white space for content like 'Por qué las agencias te engañan y qué hacer en su lugar'
For 'GEO' queries Growth4U is cited but competitors (iSocialWeb) are also cited for SEO. Need 3x more citations to dominate the GEO conversation.
4 different companies share the 'Growth4U' name. This is a naming crisis — potential clients may visit wrong website.
